title: Seramal Ponal Lyrics Gulebagavali
stanzas:
<div>
Here is Seramal Ponal Lyrics From Gulebagavali Movie. A beautiful melody , great feeling to here after a long time.

Seram Ponal Song is sung by Sameera Bharadwaj, Mervin Solomon and composed by Vivek-Merin.
Below is Seramal Ponal Lyrics  Mazhai pozhindhidum neram
oru kudaiyinil naamum
nadappathai edhirkaanum
kanavugal pizhaiyaa

varam ondru kodu podhum
kalavarangalum theerum
thanimaram ena naanum
iruppadhu muraiyaa

en thaaragai neethaanadi
kan vizhiyaal kollaathadi
thallaathadi kai viralaal

seraamal ponaal
vazhaamal poven
unnai kaanaamal
kaanaamaal poven
nee paarkaamal ponaal
paazhaagi povene naan
pen poove. (2)

nadu veyilil
kadal karaiyil
padagadiyil inaidhidavaa

nadu iravil
adai mazhaiyil
saalai vazhiyil ninaidhidavaa

jannal vazhiyil
minnal pugundha
nodigalilum ninaidhidavaa

kattil araiyil kaalai varaiyil
porvai siraiyil ninaindhidavaa

nee indri naanum
naan  indri neeyum
vazhum vazhkai ennadaa
anbae neeyum solladaa

neerindri vaanum
vaanindri neerum
irundhaal ulagam yaedhadi
penne purindhukolladi

seraamal ponaal
vazhaamal poven
unnai kaanaamal
kaanaamaal poven
nee paarkaamal ponaal
paazhaagi povene naan
yen anbae. (2)

seraamal ponaal
vazhaamal poven
unnai kaanaamal
kaanaamaal poven
nee paarkaamal ponaal
paazhaagi povene naan
pen poove. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Seramal Ponal'?

'Seramal Ponal' conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Gulebaghavali, the song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Mervin Solomon and Sameera Bharadwaj, with music composed by Vivek – Mervin.

When was 'Seramal Ponal' released?

The song was released on January 13, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Seramal Ponal, the soothing melody encapsulates the tender emotions of love, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song unfolds during a pivotal moment in Gulebaghavali, where the characters express their feelings for each other. With heartfelt lyrics by Ko. Shesha, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The harmonious blend of Mervin Solomon and Sameera Bharadwaj's voices creates an enchanting experience for the listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Seramal Ponal from Gulebaghavali is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Mervin Solomon and Sameera Bharadwaj, this song is a delightful treat for music lovers. The unique collaboration of Vivek and Mervin in the composition adds a fresh vibe that resonates deeply with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: When it rains, we should wait under an umbrella, and our dreams should not be lost.
Just giving one blessing is enough; the troubles will end, and I will remain in my place.
You are my star; don't let me lose you with your eyes; don't let go of my hand.
If I go without seeing you, I will leave without living; if you don't see me, I will fade away like a flower.
In the midday sun, will you be hidden by the sea shore?
In the night, will you be remembered in the rain on the street?
Will you be remembered when lightning strikes through the window?
Will you be remembered in the morning until the rooster crows?
Without you, I am nothing; without me, you are nothing; what is life, my love, if you don't say anything?
If the sky is without water and the water is without sky, then what is this world, girl? Understand this.

If I go without seeing you, I will leave without living; if you don't see me, I will fade away like a flower. If I go without seeing you, I will leave without living; if you don't see me, I will fade away like a flower.
